panels.description: Medium shot, 19th-century parlor. A young Russian lady kneels, weeping at the feet of a noble-looking man. Soft candlelight, ornate wallpaper, emotional and somber atmosphere.

bubbles.text: Please, I beg of you, spare me. My heart belongs to another.

panels.description: Medium shot, an austere, older Russian man sits at a heavy wooden desk, frowning as he refuses a request from the man who gestures towards a legal document (a deed for a farm). Heavy shadows, classic period drama lighting.

bubbles.text: I am bound by honour to you, sir. I will not consent to this union.

panels.description: Wide shot, Robert Walton stands on the deck of a ship looking out over icy, misty northern waters. He wears thick explorer furs, his expression is resolute and piercing. Sharp wind, gray sky, bleak arctic environment.

bubbles.text: My resolutions are as fixed as fate. The voyage will begin the moment the ice breaks.

panels.description: Close-up of Robert Walton's eyes, wide with a mixture of terror and exhilaration. Overlay of ink-style artistic sketches of a vast, churning, mysterious ocean whirlpool. Intense focus, dramatic lighting.

bubbles.text: There is something in my soul—a belief in the marvellous—that hurries me toward these wild, unvisited regions.
